title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A story of the mysteriously wealthy Jay Gatsby and his love for Daisy Buchanan.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A gripping novel about racial injustice in the American South.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: An epic science fiction masterpiece set on the desert planet Arrakis.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A brief history of humankind from the Stone Age to the Silicon Age.

author: George Orwell
description: A dystopian novel set in a totalitarian society under constant surveillance.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: The classic fantasy adventure of Bilbo Baggins and his unexpected journey.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: Proven strategies to build good habits and break bad ones.

title: Neuromancer
author: William Gibson
description: A pioneering cyberpunk novel that defined a genre.

title: Educated
author: Tara Westover
description: A powerful memoir about growing up in a survivalist family.

title: Brave New World
author: Aldous Huxley
description: A dystopian vision of a genetically engineered future society.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
description: The boy wizard begins his magical journey at Hogwarts.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: A groundbreaking exploration of the two systems that drive how we think.
